name: Teeitup365
about: Teeitup365 is a private indoor golf facility located in North Ridgeville, OH, offering high-fidelity golf simulation technology with a spacious and accommodating layout. The venue provides a complete experience with club fitting services, on-course play, and data-driven practice capabilities, all within a climate-controlled environment. Its design caters to both serious golfers looking to improve their game and social groups seeking a unique entertainment option, available for both hourly rentals and league play.
why_golfers_like_it: Huge bays and screens allow for unrestricted, natural swing motion
Highly accurate launch technology providing detailed data for practice and fitting
Spacious, club-like atmosphere ideal for leagues and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available for leagues and private events; mentions ordering pizza
Full bar available; mentions watching sports and social atmosphere

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, but rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue has a full bar and kitchen services available for leagues and events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 2-3 hours depending on simulator wait times and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Teeitup365 is family-friendly and welcomes juniors, with spacious bays that accommodate players of all sizes.
